relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Leaders ask for a sign while testing rather than receiving.
They can read weather in the evening sky.
They miss the deeper signs of the time.
Only Jonah’s sign will answer their demand.
The disciples cross over without bread.
Jesus warns them about leavened teaching.
They reduce the warning to literal bread.
Little trust forgets recent provision.
The five loaves and baskets should have taught them.
The seven loaves and baskets should have stayed in memory.
The issue is not bread but influence.
They understand the warning as teaching-leaven.
At Caesarea Philippi, Jesus asks who the Son of Humanity is.
People place him among prophetic identities.
He asks the disciples for their own knowing.
Peter names him Messiah, Son of the living Divine.
This knowing comes by revelation, not flesh and blood.
Peter/Rock and the assembly are named against the gates of Hades.
Keys, binding, and loosing link earth and heavens.
The confession is not yet to be broadcast.
Jesus begins to reveal the path through suffering, death, and rising.
Peter resists the path of suffering.
Jesus names the adversarial function in Peter’s resistance: human thinking blocking divine purpose.
Following means releasing self-rule and taking up the cross.
The life clutched is lost; the life surrendered for him is found.
The whole world cannot equal the worth of the life/soul.
The Son of Humanity comes in glory and gives according to practice.
Some will see the Son of Humanity coming in his reign.
